label: Choptank Electric Cooperative
notes: NISC SmartHub portal (choptankelectric.smarthub.coop, confirmed Jun 2026) — extension scrapes billing + usage. kWh unverified on a real generation meter; verify before trusting reports.

label: Baltimore Gas & Electric (BGE)
notes: Exelon subsidiary, serves Baltimore metro area. Bespoke portal, adapter needs a live login to reverse-engineer. Manual PDF upload accepted meanwhile.

label: Potomac Electric Power Company (Pepco)
notes: Exelon subsidiary, serves Montgomery & Prince George's counties + DC. 582k MD customers. Bespoke portal, adapter needs a live login. Manual upload meanwhile.

label: Potomac Edison
notes: FirstEnergy subsidiary, serves western MD. Bespoke portal, adapter needs a live login. Manual upload meanwhile.

label: Southern Maryland Electric Cooperative (SMECO)
notes: Not on NISC SmartHub (probed smeco.smarthub.coop, southernmarylandelectric.smarthub.coop — both 000). 175k+ member accounts in Charles, St. Mary's, southern Prince George's, and Calvert counties. Bespoke Account Manager portal, adapter needs a live login. Manual upload meanwhile.

label: Easton Utilities Commission
notes: Municipal utility serving Town of Easton. First municipality in MD to own all utilities (1923). Not on SmartHub. Bespoke portal, adapter needs a live login. Manual upload meanwhile.

label: Hagerstown Light Department
notes: City of Hagerstown municipal electric. 17.5k customers, serves Hagerstown and Funkstown. Not on SmartHub. Bespoke portal/billing system, adapter needs a live login. Manual upload meanwhile.

label: Thurmont Municipal Light Company
notes: Town of Thurmont municipal electric. Only municipality in Frederick County with own electric supplier. Not on SmartHub. Bespoke portal, adapter needs a live login. Manual upload meanwhile.

label: Town of Berlin Electric Department
notes: Municipal electric serving Town of Berlin. Established 1907, 2.6k meters, 10 MW peak. Not on SmartHub. Bespoke portal, adapter needs a live login. Manual upload meanwhile.
